title: zornia sinaloensis
intro: Zornia sinaloensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the Mexican cocklebur. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Mexican folk medicine, to treat various health conditions. The plant is known for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of fever, pain, and respiratory issues. Zornia sinaloensis can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves and roots are often used in herbal preparations to make teas, tinctures, and salves.
